title: More Vanilla Shields!
description: Lets you get more shields with vanilla materials
body:
![More Vanilla Shields! ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0caa9edfc6781c56852df51de4ede45d4d7477b1.png) Tired of having just the normal vanilla Iron Shield? **There you go!** A simple mod that allows you to craft more than just the vanilla Iron Shield! **OLD FILES WERE DELETED FOR SAFETY REASONS!** **THIS MOD PAGE IS NO LONGER OUTDATED! HAVE FUN** **Q: "Where can I see crafting Recipes?"** A: "You could download the Just Enough Items mod, or you can look in screenshots. Although, these crafting recipes are not always up to date OR you could look into the vanilla recipe book located in the crafting table" ![Discord Invite Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eccea5bb657f1b3dca277d2919e51146555f4c3b.png) ![CurseForge link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b0d9d346f3ab557b0270ab61c3871dd9daf3039_0.webp)
Spoiler Leather Shield = 196 durability Gold Shield = 322 durability Diamond Shield = 512 durability Netherite Shield = 2042 durability Emerald Shield = 512 durability Amethyst Shield = 432 durability End Crystal Shield = 750 durabiliity Obsidian Shield = 610 durability Coal Shield = 268 durability Redstone Shield = 250 durability Copper Shield = 325 durability Magma Shield = 255 durability Glass Shield = 300 durability Tinted Glass Shield = 300 durability Ender Pearl Shield = 187 durability
